void.string: <process description="modelName=com.landray.kmss.km.review.model.KmReviewTemplate&modelKey=reviewMainDoc&templateId=route-hidden-current-template-id&lbpmTmpId=route-hidden-lbpm-template-id" fdId="route-hidden-process-id" linesIndex="2" nodesIndex="3" notifyType="todo"> <nodes> <startNode id="N1" name="开始节点" x="100" y="40"/> <draftNode id="N2" name="起草节点" x="100" y="100"/> <endNode id="N3" name="结束节点" x="100" y="160"/> </nodes> <lines> <line endNodeId="N2" endPosition="1" id="L1" startNodeId="N1" startPosition="3"/> <line endNodeId="N3" endPosition="1" id="L2" startNodeId="N2" startPosition="3"/> </lines> </process>
